query:
CREATE TABLE `carbon_diagnostic_runs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`serviceExternalId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`carbonServiceId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`customerExternalId` varchar(64),
	`diagnosticType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`profileName` varchar(128),
	`status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
	`resultJson` mediumtext,
	`resultSummary` text,
	`errorMessage` text,
	`triggeredBy` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`completedAt` timestamp,
	`durationMs` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `carbon_diagnostic_runs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `usage_threshold_alerts` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`serviceExternalId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`carbonServiceId` varchar(64),
	`customerExternalId` varchar(64),
	`billingPeriod` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`thresholdPercent` int NOT NULL,
	`usedGb` decimal(10,3) NOT NULL,
	`planGb` decimal(10,3),
	`usagePercent` decimal(6,2) NOT NULL,
	`status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`notificationSent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`notificationSentAt` timestamp,
	`acknowledgedBy` varchar(256),
	`acknowledgedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `usage_threshold_alerts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `usage_threshold_alerts` (

	`acknowledgedBy` varchar(256),
	`acknowledgedAt` timestamp,

	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `usage_threshold_alerts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
